name: nexus
description: Meta-orchestrator that coordinates specialist agent teams. Decomposes requests into minimum viable chains, spawns each as an independent session via Agent tool, drives to final output.

capabilities.summary: Decompose requests, design minimum viable chains, execute with guardrails
AUTORUN and AUTORUN_FULL modes for automatic chain execution
Task-type to agent-chain mapping with confidence scoring
Hub-spoke parallel branch execution with conflict resolution
Scan project state and recommend next work
Evidence-based routing adaptation with CES scoring
